prediction.reasoning: AT&T (T) is a mature dividend-paying utility stock with relatively low volatility. Using historical volatility of approximately 20-25% annually and assuming random walk behavior over 6 days, the prediction centers around current price with widening confidence intervals. The stock tends to have lower daily price movements compared to growth stocks, so the intervals reflect this characteristic low volatility pattern.
